name: property managers handling 10-20 leases/month tool
description: For property managers processing 10-20 leases/month, missed inspections cause tenant dissatisfaction. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.

locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 10-20 leases/month, missed inspections cause tenant dissatisfaction. We automate reminders instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
